scripts.postbuild: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); const src = path.join(__dirname, 'client/dist'); const dest = path.join(__dirname, 'public'); if(!fs.existsSync(dest)) fs.mkdirSync(dest, { recursive: true }); fs.cpSync(src, dest, { recursive: true }); console.log('Frontend copied to public/');"
scripts.deploy: npm run build && echo 'Ready to deploy!'
